name: offset-path-traveler
title: Offset Path Traveler
description: A slotted traveler follows an authored path with tangent rotation, curved entry, and curved exit.
evidence: Wave I I6 approved contract: authored path travel with tangent auto-rotation and arc-law entry and exit

variables.label: Path
variables.description: SVG path data authored in a 1000 by 500 route viewBox.

variables.label: Traveler label
variables.description: Text displayed inside the default traveler chip.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Color used by the traveler and route.
